message: [typescript-best-practices] Never use 'any' → Use 'unknown' with type guards or a proper type
[drizzle-best-practices] Use TRPCError instead of generic Error in routers
[nextjs-app-router-patterns] Don't fetch in useEffect → Use Server Components or React Query
[typescript-best-practices] fetch .json() returns any → Validate with Zod schema
[typescript-best-practices] enum instead of union type or const object → Replace enum Status with union type: type Status = 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Pending'
[typescript-best-practices] Type assertion (as X) instead of satisfies → Replace 'as Config' with satisfies Config
[typescript-best-practices] @ts-expect-error suppresses type checking → Remove @ts-expect-error and fix the underlying type issue properly

[typescript-best-practices] Use discriminated unions instead of optional fields for exclusive states → Replace optional fields with discriminated union: type SettingsState = { status: 'loading' } | { status: 'success'; data: Config } | { status: 'error'; error: string }
[next-best-practices] onClick on div instead of button - should be clickable link → Wrap the card in a <Link href={...}> or use <button> with proper semantics instead of div with onClick
[next-best-practices] Icon-only buttons missing aria-label → Add aria-label to each icon button: <button aria-label="Star" ...>
[next-best-practices] Array index used as key on dynamic list → Use a stable unique identifier like email instead of array index: key={contact.email}
[next-best-practices] Using window.location instead of useSearchParams for query params → Replace window.location.search with useSearchParams() hook from next/navigation
[next-best-practices] Using router.push instead of Link component for navigation → Replace onClick={() => router.push(...)} with <Link href={...}> wrapper

[vercel-react-best-practices] useEffect to derive state that could be computed during render → Compute filteredDeals directly during render: const filteredDeals = deals.filter(...); Remove useState and useEffect
[nextjs-app-router-patterns] Inline style objects in JSX props → Extract style objects outside component or use CSS classes
[nextjs-app-router-patterns] Numeric count in conditional render renders 0 → Use {count > 0 && <X/>} or {count ? <X/> : null}
